title: 2026 年人工智能与数据科学的五大趋势
content: In 2026, AI and data science shift from experimental hype to practical, large‑scale deployment. Five trends emerge: 1) enterprises move beyond pilot projects to integrate AI into core processes, supported by mature MLOps and rigorous ROI metrics. 2) Agentic AI takes center stage, executing tasks autonomously and collaborating across teams, easing human supervision. 3) Data strategy pivots to quality over quantity, with synthetic and “small data” techniques driving vertical breakthroughs. 4) Responsible AI governance—regulatory compliance, explainability, and IP management—becomes competitive core. 5) Talent focus shifts from hiring to reskilling, creating new roles and democratizing AI tools for business users.

title: 发布仅 1 天 阿里千问 3.6-Plus 冲上 OpenRouter 榜首
content: Alibaba released Qwen 3.6‑Plus on April 2, 2026, a large‑language model with a one‑million‑token context window and claimed to be the strongest Chinese programming model. Within a day it topped OpenRouter’s daily leaderboard, surpassing 1.4 trillion tokens in a single day and breaking the platform’s single‑model record. The model achieved a top spot in Arena’s programming sub‑ranking, putting Alibaba as the second‑highest global AI organization in that metric. After launch on OpenRouter, usage rose 711 % and the model was priced below Claude. It is now available on Alibaba Cloud’s Baian platform, with plans to open source additional sizes and release a flagship Qwen 3.6‑Max.

title: 直面恐惧是最快成长
content: Facing fear is the quickest way to grow. The true “high throw, low pull” strategy exploits market bias: firms undervalued by sentiment eventually have prices return to intrinsic value when they break the bias. Buying cheaply during undervaluation yields about a 70% hit rate, rising to 90% if growth isn’t forecasted. The biggest losses occur after a huge rally followed by a 50% drop, not during undervaluation. Successful investing requires solid logic, assumption of potential error, and protection against worst-case scenarios. Embracing fear exposes opportunities and prevents easy market setbacks.

title: NASA公布阿尔忒弥斯 2 号上拍摄的地球照片，哪些细节值得关注？

It is one of a set of early images sent back while Orion continues its lunar‑transfer trajectory.

title: 中国机器人公司日薪50万招人！什么水平？
content: Ubutan a Chinese robotics firm, offers a chief embodied‑intelligence scientist a salary of up to 124 million CNY (~1.2 bn) per year, roughly 50 k CNY daily. This is rare even among Hong Kong, A‑share, and global companies, where only a few firms pay such amounts to executives. The high pay reflects a talent shortage in China’s fast‑growing humanoid‑robot sector, driven by government priority on embodied AI and the need to secure a competitive edge.

title: 第一批00后，已经开始有登味了
content: The article explains the Chinese term “登” (“deng”), a critique of people—often older or powerful—who act condescending, cling to experience, and inhibit growth. Originating from regional slang, “登” has spread online in 2024–2025 through “老登电影” and “老登文学” memes, sparking backlash against traditional authority and gender bias. The term now spans various forms (e.g., “小登”, “中登”), and is used both in self‑deprecation and criticism. The piece calls for self‑reflection and respectful communication to counter “登” attitudes.

title: 月薪过万的一线打工人，停得起车吗？
content: Buying and keeping a car in a major Chinese city is costly. Rising fuel and electricity prices, coupled with steep parking fees, tolls, insurance, maintenance, and occasional fines, strain workers’ budgets. Even with cheaper electric vehicles, monthly parking can reach ¥200–¥400, and annual ownership costs hit around ¥20,000. Thus, for earners above ¥10,000 a month, drivers must continually weigh convenience against mounting expenses.

title: 这届年轻人，开始拒绝继承“巨额遗产”了
content: In Japan, many elderly now die without heirs, leaving vast amounts of unclaimed inheritance—over 12 billion yen in 2024—entirely absorbed by the state. Roughly 25 % of seniors are wealthy, 25 % are poor, yet many live alone, with lonely deaths and undiscovered wealth common. Young people often forgo inherited homes because maintenance costs turn them into liability. Unclaimed property and land now span hundreds of thousands of hectares, creating significant economic and developmental challenges.

title: “社恐”的人如何拓展人脉
content: The article explains practical ways for people with social anxiety to manage networking events. It recommends preparing before the event—setting a time, exit plan, realistic goals, and personalized targets—then focuses on small steps during interactions, such as having a simple greeting, asking curiosity‑driven questions, and finding natural openings to join group conversations. Post‑event reflection uses a “two truths, one lie” exercise to reframe negative thoughts. The piece stresses that anxiety can be moderated, not eliminated, and small adjustments build confidence over time.
